# FindMeACitiBike

> Find the nearest Citi Bike stations in NYC with real-time availability. Paid via Machine Payments Protocol ($0.01/request).

## Endpoints

### Pick up a bike
GET /nearest?lat={latitude}&lng={longitude}&limit={count}

Returns the nearest stations with available bikes (classic and e-bikes), dock counts, and estimated walking time. Stations are sorted by distance.

- lat (required): Latitude
- lng (required): Longitude
- limit (optional): Number of results, default 3, max 10

### Park a bike
GET /dock?lat={latitude}&lng={longitude}&limit={count}

Returns the nearest stations with available docks for parking. Only includes stations that are currently accepting returns and have at least one open dock.

- lat (required): Latitude
- lng (required): Longitude
- limit (optional): Number of results, default 3, max 10

## Response Format

```json
{
  "results": [
    {
      "name": "Bedford Ave & N 7 St",
      "distance_feet": 279,
      "walk_minutes": 1,
      "ebikes_available": 3,
      "bikes_available": 11,
      "docks_available": 6,
      "lat": 40.7184,
      "lng": -73.9572
    }
  ]
}
```

## Payment

All endpoints cost $0.01 per request via Machine Payments Protocol (MPP). Payment is handled automatically by MPP-compatible clients like AgentCash.

## Data Source

Real-time station data from the Citi Bike GBFS feed (General Bikeshare Feed Specification), cached for 60 seconds.

## Quick Start

```
npx agentcash onboard
npx agentcash add https://citibike-mpp.vercel.app
```
